title: Harness Handbook: Making Evolving Agent Harnesses Readable,Navigable, and Editable
innovation_summary: Harness Handbook: Making Evolving Agent Harnesses Readable,Navigable, and Editable: We introduce the Harness Handbook, a behavior-centric representation synthesized automatically from a harness codebase via static analysis and LLM-assisted structuring, linking each behavior to its corresponding.
